File reading tool "batch_read" may output sensitive file contents without filtering
Tool "get_contact" references email without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "update_contact" uses vague action words (update) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
